offences.offenceWording: Improperly import a controlled drug of Class A to which a prohibition / restriction applies into the United Kingdom.

statementOfOffence.title: Import a controlled drug of Class A to which a prohibition applies
statementOfOffence.welshTitle: Import a controlled drug of Class A to which a prohibition applies
statementOfOffence.legislation: Contrary to section 50(3), (4), (5) of, and Schedule 1 to, the Customs and Excise Management Act 1979.

reportingRestrictions.label: Section 49 of the Children and Young Persons Act 1933 applies
